data.name: tableLayoutPanel2.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="stationRun4" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="stationRun6" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="stationRun2" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="stationRun3" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="stationRun5" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="stationRun1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="tableLayoutPanel1" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,33.33333,Percent,33.33334,Percent,33.33334" /><Rows Styles="Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Percent,25,Absolute,16" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: Label_MachineStatus.Text
data.value: 设备处于装配演示模式
